title: What caused this React app to crash?
summary: Google for Developers presents a CI pipeline puzzle where a React app crashes in production after upgrading from React 18 to React 19, with the root cause hidden in the cache setup. The video invites viewers to diagnose the issue based on build patterns and caching behavior.
writeup: Google for Developers walks through a debugging puzzle: a React app that builds fine but crashes in production after an upgrade from React 18 to React 19, with the root cause traced to the CI cache setup rather than the application code. The format presents the build patterns and caching behavior and asks for a diagnosis. The takeaway centers on how stale or misconfigured caches in a CI/CD pipeline can carry over old dependency state across a major version bump, producing failures that surface only at runtime.
